title: Build Leaderboard REST API

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in main.go — single-binary go project

Feature requirements: Build a leaderboard REST API in Go with endpoints for submitting scores, retrieving top-N rankings, player stats, and score history with in-memory storage
steps.done_condition: main.go compiles and fully implements: Build a leaderboard REST API in Go with endpoints for submitting scores, retrieving top-N rankings, player stats, and score history with in-memory storage; go.mod has correct dependencies

mergeOrder: Merge domain and ports first, then adapters, followed by use cases.

riskRegister.mitigation: Plan for persistent storage solutions in future iterations.
riskRegister.risk: In-memory storage may lead to data loss on application restart.

successCriteria: All endpoints are operational and pass integration tests.
System maintains high performance under load.
